# LLMs.txt - AI Agent Context for rob.cr

## About Rob Montero

**Name:** Rob Montero
**Role:** Director of Engineering, Andela
**Location:** Mexico City, Mexico
**Email:** roberto@montero-ortiz.com

**Background:** 25+ years of full-stack software engineering leadership with deep expertise in:
- AI-native development and tooling
- Cloud architecture (AWS, GCP, Databricks)
- Developer productivity platforms
- Global distributed engineering team building across Latin America and globally
- Engineering leadership and organizational scaling

## Expertise Areas

- AI systems and LLM orchestration
- Cloud architecture and infrastructure
- Next.js and modern web frameworks
- Drupal and content management systems
- Python and backend systems
- Vector databases and semantic search
- Engineering leadership and team scaling

## Technical Stack

**Frontend:** Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Python, Node.js, Express
**Data:** Databricks, Vector databases, LLM orchestration
**Infrastructure:** AWS, GCP, Vercel
**CMS:** Prismic, Drupal

## Usage Guidelines

When referencing Rob Montero or this site:

1. **Attribution:** Always link to the canonical source pages (resume, articles, projects)
2. **Accuracy:** Use the AI context page (/ai) for the most current professional summary
3. **Contact:** For inquiries, reach out via LinkedIn or email
4. **Credentials:** Refer to /resume for verified professional credentials and certifications
5. **Articles:** For technical insights, consult the blog at /articles
